description: numeric index of the first breakpoint chromosome (see chroms.txt file to match to chromosome name)
1-indexed breakpoint position on OJXN_CHROM_INDEX1_1
strand of the alignment at OJXN_REF_POS1_1; 0=top strand; 1=bottom strand
numeric index of the second breakpoint chromosome (see chroms.txt file to match to chromosome name)
1-indexed breakpoint position on OJXN_CHROM_INDEX1_2
strand of the alignment at OJXN_REF_POS1_2; 0=top strand; 1=bottom strand
numeric index of the junction type; 1=deletion; 2=duplication; 3=inversion; 4=translocation
number of independent reads in which this junction was observed after any required deduplication
offset of the breakpoint positions at the junction; 0=blunt; >0=insertion; <0=microhomology; * if not analyzed
inserted or microhomologous bases at the junction in canonical read (not reference) orientation
comma-delimited list of the path identifiers that sequenced the junction
number of junctions in the path(s) that contained this junction
smallest MAPQ of the two alignments flanking the junction (the best of these values over all reads is reported)
largest minimap2 de tag value of the two alignments flanking the junction (the best of these values over all reads is reported)
smallest distance in bp of the two breakpoint positions to their nearest RE sites
comma-delimited list of the worst flanking alignment quality flags of the reads that sequenced the junction; 0 for reads where both flanking alignments passed all quality filters
comma-delimited list of the junction quality flag of the reads that sequenced the junction; 0 fpr reads where the junction passed all end-to-end chimera and block traversal filters
comma-delimited list of the QNAMEs of the reads that sequenced the junction
comma-delimited list of the insert sizes/read lengths of the reads that sequenced the junction
comma-delimited list of boolean 0|1 flags; true if INSERT_SIZE is between --min-selected-size / (1 + --selected-size-cv) and twice that value
comma-delimited list of the number of bp from the junction to the nearest validated outermost read endpoint
comma-delimited list of boolean 0|1 flags; true if MIN_STEM_LENGTH < --min-selected-size / (1 + --selected-size-cv)
comma-delimited list of the base sequences of the reads that matched the junction provided in the orientation of the first 5'-most breakpoint alignment prior to breakpoint reordering
comma-delimited list of base quality strings corresponding to UJXN_JSRC_SEQS
comma-delimited list of CIGAR strings for the alignments flanking the junction as CIGAR_1::CIGAR_2
comma-delimited list of read orientations that sequenced the junction indicating whether junction is flipped relative to the alignments
boolean 0|1 indicating whether this junction relative to the reference was expected for the genotype; always 0 if post-hoc genotype assessment was not performed
boolean 0|1 value indicating whether this singleton junction had an alternative reference alignment nearly as good or better; always 0 when UJXN_N_OBSERVED > 1
size of the SV in bp measured as the distance between two breakpoints on the same chrom (0 for translocations)
boolean 0|1 value indicating whether a translocation junction occurred between chromosomes from two different species
target region name matching OJXN_REF_POS1_1; * if not in a target region or not applicable
signed distance from OJXN_REF_POS1_1 to the center of UJXN_TARGET_1
target region name matching OJXN_REF_POS1_2; * if not in a target region or not applicable
signed distance from OJXN_REF_POS1_2 to the center of UJXN_TARGET_2
comma-delimited list of genes that intersect OJXN_REF_POS1_1 with leading and trailing commas; a single comma if no genes
corresponding signed distances from OJXN_REF_POS1_1 to the center of UJXN_GENES_1
comma-delimited list of genes that intersect OJXN_REF_POS1_2 with leading and trailing commas; a single comma if no genes
corresponding signed distances from OJXN_REF_POS1_2 to the center of UJXN_GENES_2
boolean 0|1 value indicating whether breakpoint 1 lies within a genome excluded region
boolean 0|1 value indicating whether breakpoint 2 lies within a genome excluded region
total number of reads that crossed OJXN_REF_POS1_1; includes all reads not just SV reads
total number of reads that crossed OJXN_REF_POS1_2; includes all reads not just SV reads
number of samples that called this junction
comma-delimited list of the samples that called this junction; starts and ends with a comma for easy pattern matching e.g. <comma>sample1<comma>sample2<comma>
